title: Sets
source_outline: Set operations: union, intersection, difference, symmetric difference
Membership and mutation: add, remove, discard

artifact_plan.profile_note: Corpus suggested standard (2680w); human chose deep at HITL#2. Corpus expanded with genuine depth (frozenset, subset/superset + isdisjoint, in-place update operators, membership performance, richer examples) to clear the deep floor.
artifact_plan.diagram_intent: Set-operations map (Mermaid approximation of a Venn): two source sets A and B, and the four result operations union (A|B), intersection (A&B), difference (A-B), symmetric difference (A^B), each as a labelled node with its brief meaning. Not a true Venn (Mermaid limitation) but a clear operations diagram.
artifact_plan.diagram_note: Human chose a Mermaid approximation at HITL#2 despite the Venn limitation.

next_assessment.title: Data Structures Portfolio
next_assessment.outcome: The learner can choose and manipulate the right Python data structure for a given data-handling task.
